---
title: "Good day!"
image: images/profile.jpg
about: 
    template: marquee
    image-alt: "Picture of an ice cream cone at the foreground and the beach in Bournemouth, UK in the background"
    links:
        - icon: github
          text: GitHub
          href: https://github.com/phamlk 
        - icon: google
          text: Google Scholar
          href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=0SboRTIAAAAJ&hl=en
---

I'm an MD/PhD student completing my medical school training through the [UT Health Science Center San Antonio MSTP](https://uthscsa.edu/biomedical-sciences/programs/md-phd) and my graduate studies through the [NIH OxCam Program](https://oxcam.gpp.nih.gov). I'm currently in my fourth year of graduate school, studying how patterns of regional sex differences in the mouse brain emerge throughout development. 

I also sing with the [Washington Metropolitan Gamer Symphony Orchestra](https://www.wmgso.org) as a clueless non-gamer and tandem bike as a captain with the [Metropolitan Washington Association of Blind Athletes](https://gomwaba.org).
